## Findings
- [ ] **[WARN][Version] No release-relevant changes since v2.2.2; planned v2.2.3 milestone is open**
  - **Status quo:** The unreleased diff since `v2.2.2` contains only test-file changes (PRs #236 and #237). Per `07-gh-release` bump rules this yields `bump=none` (target `v2.2.2`). The open milestone `v2.2.3` has 0 open issues and 4 closed issues.
  - **Likely cause:** The `v2.2.3` milestone was populated with coverage/test work that does not itself change shipped behavior.
  - **Proposed solution:** If a `v2.2.3` release is intended, merge a release-relevant change (bugfix, feature, packaging/security fix) first and re-run `/06-gh-prerelease`; otherwise close or rename the `v2.2.3` milestone after confirming no release is needed.
  - **Handoff:** `/02-gh-plan` to reconcile the milestone title with the actual release intent, then re-run `/06-gh-prerelease`.
